3156730.name: Palix Transit
3156730.description:
Palix Transit

A turn-based role-playing game in a unique, hand-crafted universe.

Immerse yourself in the mystical world of Hara, a planet inhabited by seven sacred races descended from seven gods. The journey of this world began over a decade ago, and now you can explore it in Palix Transit with a vibe reminiscent of 16-bit RPGs.

The story

In the small village of Loriko, the young Amoran Soken is preparing for the Palix Festival, an event that celebrates the Palix Transit - an astrological term associated with the third and final war of the gods. But just before the festival, Ajila, Soken's girlfriend, has a disturbing dream. When a strange object appears in the sky and two powerful beings threaten Loriko, her worst fears are realized. In the end, Soken will take up the fight against the overpowering opponents, but how will he face this impossible task?

You decide, in the open world you can freely explore parts of South Arluna. Discover secrets, level up and equip yourself, find allies, solve puzzles, face powerful creatures and more.

Gameplay features

- Turn-based battles: classic JRPG gameplay

- Telekinesis mechanics: Use Soken's ability to solve puzzles and riddles.

- Comrades-in-arms Collect allies to help you on your journey.

- Diverse equipment: Equip your characters with weapons, headdresses, powerful masks and shields.

- Platformer elements: Jump and explore the world to discover hidden secrets.

- Secrets and Lore: Find secrets or delve into the world.

Find the villagers Loriko to gather them.

Venture towards Inedua, the castle that rose from nothing over twenty years ago, to take on its roaming creatures. But be careful, Inedua did not only attract large animals.

Important notice:

This game was developed by a single developer. Please do not expect AAA quality.

It is a unique, original universe with deep, diverse lore with handcrafted, lovingly created characters penned by the solo developer whose initial models and ideas date back over a decade.
